docs:
# Table
Styled data table with hover rows and compact typography.
## Import
```tsx
import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell } from "@/components/ui/table";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<Table compact={false} value={undefined} change={undefined} trend={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **compact** (boolean) — default: `false`: Compact rows
- **label** (string): Label
- **value** (string): Value
- **change** (string): Change
- **trend** (string): Trend
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add table
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/table
```
